Core CRM.Description: Lead Router Security - Tenant Isolation & Domain Bypass. Fix 4 CRITICAL/MEDIUM security issues: (1) scoreWithAI fire-and-forget uses raw ctx.prisma instead of prismaWithTenant - cross-tenant data leak risk [S2]. (2) logActivity $transaction uses raw ctx.prisma - may bypass tenant middleware [S3]. (3) bulkUpdateStatus uses direct Prisma updateMany bypassing Lead.changeStatus() domain validation - skips status transition rules and domain events [S4]. (4) getHotLeads/getReadyForQualification pass userId as ownerId without explicit tenantId [S9]. Fix: Replace ctx.prisma with prismaWithTenant in all cases. Route bulkUpdateStatus through domain model. Add explicit tenantId to hot/ready queries.
